props.className: text-base font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4 pb-3 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700
w-full px-4 py-2.5 pr-10 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 cursor-not-allowed

props.name: name
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.name ? 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500 focus:border-transparent' : 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-900 dark:focus:ring-white focus:border-transparent'}}

props.name: nickname
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.nickname ? 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500 focus:border-transparent' : 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-900 dark:focus:ring-white focus:border-transparent'}}
text-base font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4 pb-3 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700

props.name: mobile
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.mobile ? 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white' : 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white'}}

props.name: phone
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.phone ? 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white' : 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white'}}

props.name: homepage
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.homepage ? 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white' : 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white'}}
text-base font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4 pb-3 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700

props.name: country
props.options: {{[{ label: $t('mypage.profile.country_placeholder'), value: '' }].concat((_defines?.countryList ?? []).map(c => ({ value: c.code, label: $t('countries.' + c.code) })))}}

props.name: language
props.options: {{[{ label: $t('mypage.profile.language_placeholder'), value: '' }].concat((_global.appConfig?.supportedLocales ?? []).map(l => ({ value: l, label: $t('languages.' + l) })))}}

props.name: timezone
props.options: {{[{ label: $t('mypage.profile.timezone_placeholder'), value: '' }].concat(_global.appConfig?.supportedTimezones?.map(tz => ({ value: tz, label: $t('timezones.' + tz) })) ?? [])}}

props.name: zipcode
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.zipcode ? 'w-28 px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white' : 'w-28 px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white'}}

props.name: address
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.address ? 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white' : 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white'}}

props.name: address_detail
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.address_detail ? 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white' : 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white'}}
text-base font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4 pb-3 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700

props.name: signature
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.signature ? 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white resize-none' : 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white resize-none'}}

props.name: bio
props.className: {{_local.profileErrors?.bio ? 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-red-500 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white resize-none' : 'w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white resize-none'}}
